divergences.claim: Private documents are allow-listed by team. AccessPolicy.can_view grants a non-owner, non-admin user access to a private document only if their team is explicitly present in the document's team list (team in permitted_teams). The default for any team that is not listed is DENY, so a user whose team is absent from the list cannot view the document.
divergences.prose: Private documents are allow-listed by team. AccessPolicy.can_view grants a non-owner, non-admin user access to a private document only if their team is explicitly present in the document's team list (team in permitted_teams). The default for any team that is not listed is DENY, so a user whose team is absent from the list cannot view the document.
